zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Somerville於大約1235年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾林頓時，他的父親Sir John de Somerville-Aston 6th Baron of Wychnor, 1st Baron of Linton83歲，母親Joan Everingham16歲。他於1275年5月7日之前與Isabel Merlay在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1297年10月17日在英國斯塔福爾維諾享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Somerville于大约1235年出生在苏格兰洛包爾林頓时，他的父亲Sir John de Somerville-Aston 6th Baron of Wychnor, 1st Baron of Linton83岁，母亲Joan Everingham16岁。他于1275年5月7日之前与Isabel Merlay在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1297年10月17日在英国斯塔福爾維諾享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Somerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Graveron-Sémerville in Eure (Normandy), from the ancient Germanic personal name Sigimar (see Siemer ) + Old French ville ‘settlement’. The surname was taken to Scotland in the 12th century by William de Somerville, a retainer of David, Earl of Huntingdon, who became King David I of Scotland.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Somacháin (see Summers ) or Mag Shamradháin (see Somers ).

variants.name: Siemer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Helmuth, Otto, Theresia.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Siegmar, composed of the elements sigi ‘victory’ + mari, meri ‘famous’.

variants.name: Summerville
meanings: English, Scottish (Lanarkshire), and Irish: variant of   Somerville  . This form of the surname is particularly common in Ireland.

variants.name: Simrell
meanings: Scottish: perhaps related to the Ulster nameSumeril, a variant of Somerville .

variants.name: Summerfield
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English sumor ‘summer’ + feld ‘field, open land’, denoting summer pasture or fields cultivated only in summer, such as Summerfield in Woodnesborough (Kent), Somerfield Court in Sellindge (Kent), and Summerfield in Marlborough (Wiltshire).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Sommerfeld  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Somerville was born about 1235, in Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John de Somerville-Aston 6th Baron of Wychnor, 1st Baron of Linton, was 83 and his mother, Joan Everingham, was 16. He married Isabel Merlay before 7 May 1275, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 17 October 1297, in Wychnor, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Somerville est né environ 1235, à Linton, Roxburghshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John de Somerville-Aston 6th Baron of Wychnor, 1st Baron of Linton, avait 83 ans et sa mère, Joan Everingham, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Merlay avant 7 mai 1275, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 17 octobre 1297, à Wychnor, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Somerville um 1235 in Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Somerville-Aston 6th Baron of Wychnor, 1st Baron of Linton 83 und seine Mutter Joan Everingham 16. Er hat vor 7. Mai 1275 in Staffordshire, England Isabel Merlay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Oktober 1297 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Wychnor, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Somerville è nato il circa 1235 nel Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John de Somerville-Aston 6th Baron of Wychnor, 1st Baron of Linton, aveva 83 anni e il suo madre, Joan Everingham, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Merlay prima del 7 maggio 1275, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 17 ottobre 1297, nel Wychnor, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Somervilleが約1235年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアリントンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Somerville-Aston 6th Baron of Wychnor, 1st Baron of Lintonは83歳，母Joan Everinghamは16歳であった。1275年5月7日以前にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでIsabel Merlayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1297年10月17日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアウイチノーで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Somerville(이)가 대략 1235년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 린턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Somerville-Aston 6th Baron of Wychnor, 1st Baron of Linton(은)는 83세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Everingham(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1275년 5월 7일 이전 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Isabel Merlay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1297년 10월 17일 영국 스태퍼드실르 윈이ch너에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Somerville nasceu aproximadamente 1235, em Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John de Somerville-Aston 6th Baron of Wychnor, 1st Baron of Linton, tinha 83 anos e sua mãe, Joan Everingham, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Merlay antes 7 de maio de 1275, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de outubro de 1297, em Wychnor, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Somerville родился около 1235 г. в местности линтон, роксбургшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Somerville-Aston 6th Baron of Wychnor, 1st Baron of Linton было 83 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Everingham, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Merlay перед 7 май 1275 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 17 октября 1297 г. в местности вичнор, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Somerville nació aproximadamente 1235, en Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John de Somerville-Aston 6th Baron of Wychnor, 1st Baron of Linton, tenía 83 años y su mamá, Joan Everingham, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Isabel Merlay antes de 7 de mayo de 1275, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 17 de octubre de 1297, en Wychnor, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
